title: More Energy Tunnels
description: Higher transfer rate tunnels for Compact Machines
body:
This mod is an addon for [Compact Machines](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/compact-machines) which adds three new energy tunnels for Compact Machines with higher transfer rate for each tier.

The tiers are as follows

| Tier             | Rate           |
| ----------- | -------------: |
| Advanced  | 51.200 FE/t    |
| Elite           | 409.600 FE/t   |
| Ultimate    | 3.270.000 FE/t |
